meaning: adj.[鍖籡鐢茬姸鑵烘満鑳芥甯哥殑
examples: The positive rate of anti thyroid antibodies was 68.6% in euthyroid first degree relatives.
Objective To evaluate the presence of euthyroid sick syndrome(ESS) in chronic congestive heart failure(CCHF) patients.
FT3 was significantly decreased in nephrotic syndrome patients, which suggested that nephrotic syndrome be a kind of euthyroid sick syndrome.
